title: deschampsia flexuosa subsp. corsica
intro: Deschampsia flexuosa subsp. corsica, also known as Corsican bent, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Deschampsia flexuosa subsp. corsica include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health issues and support overall well-being.
